# Competitor rate & availability benchmark → report — n8n

Benchmark your listing’s rate and availability against a defined comp-set and get a weekly position report.

## Import

1. In n8n: **Workflows → ⋯ → Import from File** and select `comp-set-benchmark.json`.
2. Create a **Header Auth** credential named `Authorization` with value `Bearer scout_live_YOUR_KEY` and assign it to the ScoutingAPI HTTP node(s).
3. Set your inputs, add your delivery credential (e.g. Slack), and run.

Get a free key (no card) at <https://scoutingapi.com/signup>. Rendered detail page: [https://scoutingapi.com/workflows/comp-set-benchmark](https://scoutingapi.com/workflows/comp-set-benchmark).
